DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MTN TO COMPEL VERIFIED RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND VERIFIED RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS; AND FOR FURTHER VERIFIED RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET 1 IS GRANTED, FOR REASONS SET FORTH IN DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOVING PAPERS. THERE IS NO RECORD THAT PLAINTIFF SHERRY FREIMAN OPPOSES THIS MOTION. IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) DAYS OF THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE SIGNED ORDER ON THIS MOTION: (1) PLAINTIFF FREIMAN SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET NO. 1; (2) PLAINTIFF FREIMAN SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET NO. 1; (3) PLAINTIFF FREIMAN SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET NO. 1, AND PRODUCE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, THE COURT FURTHER AWARDS MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF FREIMAN IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00, TO BE PAID WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) DAYS OF THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE SIGNED ORDER ON THIS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories And Verified Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Produce Responsive Documents; And For Further Verified Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set 1
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL A. GERCHOW, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3986, APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Mtn To Compel Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories And Verified Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Produce Responsive Documents; And For Further Verified Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set 1 is Granted, for reasons set forth in defendant City and County of San Francisco's moving papers. There is no record that plaintiff Sherry Freiman opposes this motion. It is hereby ordered that within fifteen (15) days of the notice of entry of the signed Order on this motion: (1) plaintiff Freiman shall provide verified responses to Form Interrogatories, Set No. 1; (2) plaintiff Freiman shall provide verified responses to Special Interrogatories, Set No. 1; (3) plaintiff Freiman shall provide verified responses to defendant's Request For Production of Documents, Set No. 1, and produce all responsive documents, The Court further awards monetary sanctions against plaintiff Freiman in the amount of $500.00, to be paid within fifteen (15) days of the notice of entry of the signed Order on this motion. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro-tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not Reported. =302/JPT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Assigned To Arbitration On Mar-24-14
